name: procurement managers in small to medium-sized e-commerce businesses processing 10–20 invoices/month tool
description: For procurement managers in small to medium-sized e-commerce businesses processing 10–20 invoices/month, inaccurate reconciliation causes cash flow gaps. We automate the reconciliation process instead of manual reconciliation processes.
target_audience: procurement managers in small to medium-sized e-commerce businesses processing 10–20 invoices/month
problem_solved: Inaccurate reconciliation of vendor invoices with purchase orders
